items.name: core
items.title: slither-charts — Core
items.description: Shared engine for slither-charts: the canvas snake painter (traveling-wave slither, species skins, blinking eyes, forked tongues), scales, contexts, and the grid/axes/legend/HissTip chrome. Installed automatically by every chart. Zero dependencies, zero legs.

items.name: slither-chart
items.title: Slither Chart (line)
items.description: Line chart where every series is a live snake slithering along the data, head resting on the latest value. Scrub tooltip with a crosshair mouse the snakes never catch. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.

items.name: cobra-chart
items.title: Cobra Chart (bar)
items.description: Bar chart where every bar is a cobra rearing to the exact height of your KPI, hood flared. Grouped series, staggered rise-in. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.

items.name: ouroboros-chart
items.title: Ouroboros Chart (pie)
items.description: Pie chart as a ring of snakes, each politely biting the next one's tail — the circle that eats itself. Hover to make a slice rear up. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.

items.name: worm
items.title: Worm (sparkline)
items.description: Sparkline. Legally a snake, spiritually a worm. Fits in a stat tile, points at your KPI, occasionally flicks its tongue at it. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.

items.name: nest-chart
items.title: Nest Chart (scatter)
items.description: Scatter plot where every point is a baby snake coiled up at its coordinates — bubble size makes the coil bigger. Hover a nest to wake one. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.

items.name: medusa-chart
items.title: Medusa Chart (radial bars)
items.description: Radial bar chart: snakes radiating from one center, each as long as its value, labels around the rim. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.

items.name: boa-meter
items.title: BoaMeter (gauge)
items.description: Gauge chart: a progress snake chasing its own tail around a dashed track. At 100% it catches it and becomes a full ouroboros. This is called shipping.

items.name: viperstick-chart
items.title: Viperstick Chart (candlestick)
items.description: Candlestick chart for the finance reptiles: one snake per candle (wicks are tails, the fat mid-body spans open→close), volume lane of juveniles, a moving-average trend snake, last-price tag, and a live mode where the newest candle hasn't slept since listing.

items.name: slither-charts
items.title: slither-charts — Everything
items.description: The whole reptile house: line, bar, pie, area, scatter, radial, gauge, candlestick, and sparkline charts where every mark is a live snake, on one tiny canvas engine. An unhinged homage to dither-kit.
